languages.text: "Я Помазанник Бога-Императора, и если пожелаю — ваша голова полетит с плеч. Молитесь, чтобы это не произошло прежде, чем вы дадите ответ".
"I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."
languages.original_text: "Я Помазанник Бога-Императора, и если пожелаю — ваша голова полетит с плеч. Молитесь, чтобы это не произошло прежде, чем вы дадите ответ".

traits.locale_text: "I am the anointed of the God-Emperor, and should I wish it, your head shall leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."
"I am the anointed of the God-Emperor, and should I wish it, your head shall leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."
"I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."
"I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."

languages.text: "Ich bin der Gesalbte des Gottimperators und wenn mir danach ist, lasse ich Euch enthaupten. Betet, dass das nicht passiert, ehe Ihr mir geantwortet habt."
languages.original_text: "I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin der Gesalbte des Gottimperators und wenn mir danach ist, lasse ich Euch enthaupten. Betet, dass das nicht passiert, ehe Ihr mir geantwortet habt."

languages.text: « Je suis l'élu de l'Empereur-Dieu, et si tel est mon désir, votre tête quittera votre corps. Priez que ça n'arrive pas avant que vous m'ayez répondu. »
languages.original_text: "I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis l'élu de l'Empereur-Dieu, et si tel est mon désir, votre tête quittera votre corps. Priez que ça n'arrive pas avant que vous m'ayez répondu. »

languages.text: «Soy el ungido del Dios Emperador y, si así lo quiero, su cabeza se despedirá de sus hombros. Rece para que eso no ocurra antes de que responda».
languages.original_text: "I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."

traits.locale_text: «Soy el ungido del Dios Emperador y, si así lo quiero, su cabeza se despedirá de sus hombros. Rece para que eso no ocurra antes de que responda».

languages.text: "Ben Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişiyim. Ben istersem başın omuzlarından ayrılır. Cevap vermeden önce bunun olmaması için dua et."
languages.original_text: "I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişiyim. Ben istersem başın omuzlarından ayrılır. Cevap vermeden önce bunun olmaması için dua et."

languages.text: “我是神皇神选者。只要我愿意，你随时都会身首异处。为了避免这种事的发生，你最好尽快回答。”
languages.original_text: "I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."

traits.locale_text: “我是神皇神选者。只要我愿意，你随时都会身首异处。为了避免这种事的发生，你最好尽快回答。”

languages.text: 「私は神皇帝の選民であり、私が望めば、貴方の首は肩から外れます。答えを提示する前に、そのことが起こらないことを祈ってください。」
languages.original_text: "I am the anointed of the God-Emperor and, should I wish it, your head will leave your shoulders. Pray that does not happen before you provide an answer."

traits.locale_text: 「私は神皇帝の選民であり、私が望めば、貴方の首は肩から外れます。答えを提示する前に、そのことが起こらないことを祈ってください。」
